Custom button.

  • Constructor Details

    • FigButton

      public FigButton(int x, int y, int width, int height, net.minecraft.network.chat.Component label, net.minecraft.client.gui.components.Button.OnPress onPress, int col1, int col2, int border1, int border2, int borderSize)
      Creates a FigButton widget
      Parameters:
      label - Text to be displayed on the button
      onPress - Event to be executed on mouseRelease
      col1 - Top gradient color
      col2 - Bottom gradient color
      border1 - Top border color
      border2 - Bottom border color
      borderSize - Border thickness
